channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Nakuru Police Investigate Murder of PCEA Pastor Julius Ndumia Amid Community Concerns
item.description: In Lanet, Bahati Constituency, Nakuru, residents are shaken after the murder of PCEA pastor Julius Ndumia, who was found dead at his house within the church compound on Sunday night, May 3, 2026. Acco...

item.title: Craig Silvey pleads guilty to possessing and distributing child exploitation material
item.description: Craig Silvey, once celebrated as one of Australia's leading authors, has pleaded guilty to offences relating to child exploitation. Known for his acclaimed novels such as Jasper Jones and Rhubarb, Sil...

item.title: India Condemns Attacks on Citizens in Fujairah Amid Escalating Iran-US Tensions over Strait of Hormuz
item.description: On May 4, 2026, a drone attack originating from Iran targeted the Fujairah Oil and Industrial Zone (FOIZ) in the United Arab Emirates, injuring three Indian nationals. The Ministry of External Affairs...

item.title: BJP’s post-2024 state election strategy and anti-incumbency management in 2026
item.description: The article argues that the BJP has developed a more effective electoral playbook after the 2024 Lok Sabha setback, using state-specific adjustments to overcome anti-incumbency and improve its perform...

item.title: Former Vodafone franchisees allege financial losses and unfair business practices
item.description: Two former Vodafone franchise operators from Lincolnshire, along with dozens of others, are taking legal action against the company, alleging that changes to its franchise model caused severe financia...

item.title: PM Modi Condemns Iran's Attack on UAE's Fujairah Injuring Three Indian Nationals
item.description: New Delhi, 5th May 2026: Prime Minister Narendra Modi strongly condemned the recent Iranian attack on Fujairah in the United Arab Emirates, which resulted in injuries to three Indian nationals. In a p...

item.title: NSFAS put under administration again amid governance failures and audit concerns
item.description: Higher Education and Training Minister Buti Manamela has placed the National Student Financial Aid Scheme (NSFAS) under administration for the third time since 2018, citing serious governance and oper...

item.title: Sara Duterte’s cautious strategy may weaken her presidential bid
item.description: The article argues that Vice President Sara Duterte’s current political strategy may be hurting, rather than helping, her long-term chances of becoming president. It says her camp appears to be relyin...

item.title: Quebec launches digital health records system to modernize patient care
item.description: Quebec is set to launch its long-awaited digital health records system later this week, initially rolling out in Montreal and the Mauricie region. The initiative aims to modernize healthcare services ...

item.title: Aminu Gwarzo Resigns from ADC Citing Changing Political Climate in Kano
item.description: Former Deputy Governor of Kano State, Aminu Gwarzo, don officially resign from the African Democratic Congress (ADC). He submit im resignation letter on May 1, 2026, to the party chairman for Gwarzo L...

item.title: BJP's V Muraleedharan Wins Kazhakoottam in Kerala Assembly Elections 2026, Ending Marxist Stronghold
item.description: In the 2026 Kerala Assembly Elections, V Muraleedharan, a prominent leader of the Bharatiya Janata Party (BJP), achieved a significant victory in Kazhakoottam, a constituency traditionally dominated b...

item.title: Former ANC Spokesperson Pule Mabe Appears in Court Over R27 Million Tender Case
item.description: Former ANC spokesperson Pule Mabe, along with his wife Elsie and two other co-accused, returned to the Palm Ridge magistrate’s court on Tuesday to face charges of fraud and theft linked to a R27 milli...

item.title: Image AI Releases Boost App Downloads More Than Chatbot Updates, Study Shows
item.description: A recent report by app intelligence firm Appfigures indicates that the release of image-generating AI models is driving significantly higher app downloads compared to traditional conversational model ...

item.title: DCI Apprehends Two Governor Natembeya’s Staff in Trans Nzoia for Organised Crime
item.description: In Trans Nzoia County, the Directorate of Criminal Investigations (DCI) has arrested two individuals linked to Governor George Natembeya’s office for alleged involvement in organised criminal activiti...

item.title: Guidance for parents on supporting children through separation
item.description: Separation can be challenging for families, particularly when children are involved. While research indicates a slightly higher risk of mental health difficulties for children of divorced parents, sep...

item.title: 19-Year-Old Receives Suspended Sentence After Assault at Canberra Nightclub
item.description: In Canberra last August, a night out at Mooseheads nightclub turned violent when 19-year-old Ty Broers, heavily intoxicated, assaulted two men on the dance floor. The first victim was punched multiple...

item.title: Solo Dining Grows in Popularity Worldwide as Data Shows Higher Spending, Despite Occasional Restaurant Resistance
item.description: Solo dining is experiencing a significant global surge in popularity, particularly among travelers and in major business hubs, according to data from OpenTable. The reservation platform reported a 19%...

item.title: California officials capture and release a bear at Hansen Dam after it wandered near people
item.description: California Department of Fish and Wildlife officials captured a 275-pound bear at Hansen Dam on Monday after it had caused concern among local residents over the weekend. The black bear was first spot...

item.title: Ontario resale ticket cap challenges season ticket holders’ plans
item.description: Ontario’s recent legislation capping resale ticket prices at face value plus certain taxes and fees is causing frustration among season ticket holders for professional sports teams, including the Toro...

item.title: Christopher Nolan's The Odyssey unveils new trailer with star-studded cast
item.description: Christopher Nolan’s highly anticipated film, The Odyssey, has released a fresh trailer, giving audiences a glimpse of his latest epic take on the classic tale. The film stars Matt Damon as Odysseus, t...
